metric_algorithm.vth: maximum absolute Savitzky-Golay gm tangent intercept

figure_line_rule: Transfer figures use one consistent color per dose: simulation solid, experiment dashed. Metric figures use simulation solid and experiment dashed with experimental standard-deviation error bars.
limitations: The dose mapping is user-provided GUI-order labeling, not independently inferred from gtree metadata.
GUI-manual SDevice runs have no repository atomic-lease or affinity evidence; formal_valid=false and these are not formal compliant curves.
With the mandated 21-point / R2>=0.98 SS algorithm, six simulated curves have no eligible SS window; no SS value or comparison difference was fabricated.
